description: Pilot — Sermon on the Mount; Jesus teaches His disciples
mustContain: Seeing the multitudes, He went up onto the mountain. When He had sat down, His disciples came to Him.
He opened His mouth and taught them, saying,
mustNotContain: Seeing the multitudes, he went up onto the mountain. When he had sat down, his disciples came to him.
he opened his mouth and taught them, saying,
